ats_utilities.config_io.cfg.cfg_processor module¶

cfg_processor.py

Info

Defines class CFGProcessor with attribute(s) and method(s). Default implementation for processing CFG content.

class ats_utilities.config_io.cfg.cfg_processor.CFGProcessor[source]¶

Bases: ICFGProcessor

Defines class CFGProcessor with attribute(s) and method(s). Default implementation for processing CFG content.

It defines:

attributes:
_REGEX_EXP - Regular expression for matching line.
_data - Dictionary with CFG information.
methods:
__init__ - Initializes CFGProcessor constructor.
from_lines - Loads CFG configuration from lines.
to_string - Converts CFG configuration to string.
to_dict - Converts CFG configuration to dictionary.
__str__ - Returns the CFGProcessor as string representation.
_REGEX_EXP: str = '^\\s*$'¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_data: dict[str, str]¶
from_lines(lines: list[str]) → bool[source]¶

Loads CFG configuration from lines.

Parameters:

lines (<list[str]>) – CFG content as a list of strings.

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail).

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

to_dict() → dict[str, str][source]¶

Converts CFG configuration to dictionary.

Returns:

Dictionary with CFG information.

Return type:

<dict[str, str]>

Exceptions:

None.

to_string() → str[source]¶

Converts CFG configuration to string.

Returns:

CFG content as string.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None.
